name: Brinc Bus Systems Of Chrleston
notes: Likely name-data error in source list: 'Brinc Bus Systems of Charleston' appears to be a corruption of 'Brinc Business Systems of Charleston Inc.' — a COPIER/office equipment dealer at 497-F La Mesa Rd, Mount Pleasant SC 29464 (BBB profile, principal Richard N. Neff, opened 3/26/2002). Not a school bus / pupil transport operator. No FMCSA SAFER record exists for any 'Brinc Bus' carrier in SC. PO Box 762 Mount Pleasant in source likely the company's mailing address. Recommend removing from Summit tuck-in target list.

name: Kids Taxi Svc
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). Kids Taxi Service confirmed operating at 2108 Grant St, Concord CA 94520 as a buses/school-transportation service per directory listings, but no FMCSA SAFER carrier exists by this name in CA. One unrelated 'KIDS TAXI' record in SAFER is USDOT 1094454 ('MONIQUE' dba KIDS TAXI) located in Rex, GA — not a match. California CHP regulates school pupil activity buses (SPAB) intrastate; this operator likely registered only with CA DMV/CHP, not FMCSA. No CA Secretary of State entity hit on name variants searched.

name: Ditter Brothers AG Bus
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). Multiple FMCSA SAFER searches (DITTER, DITTER BROS, DITTER BROTHERS) returned zero matches. Property at 19533 Hwy 392, Greeley CO 80631 is a 77.78-acre Weld County parcel (parcel R6783068, built 1951) — agricultural/residential rather than commercial bus depot, consistent with a small farm-based intrastate operator. 'AG Bus' suffix unusual; possibly a school-route activity bus operator serving Weld RE-1 / Greeley-Evans D6 rural routes, or a corruption (e.g., 'Activity Bus' / agricultural workforce shuttle). Colorado SOS portal blocked direct fetch (HTTP 403); recommend manual sos.state.co.us check on 'Ditter' surname for entity filings. Possible related individual: Laura Ditter (Greeley public records).

name: Lansing School Bus Svc
registry_source: Kansas business directory listings (Manta, Yelp, Punchbowl, CMac)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). Lansing School Bus Service operates at 104 Rock Creek Lp/Commercial Ct, Lansing KS 66043, phone (913) 727-3884. Strong evidence it operates as / is DBA of 'School Services & Leasing Inc' at the same Rock Creek Commercial Ct address with identical phone (913-727-3884) — listed under bus charters category. FMCSA SAFER returns no matches for either 'LANSING SCHOOL BUS', 'LANSING BUS', or 'SCHOOL SERVICES LEASING' — consistent with intrastate-only KS pupil transport (Kansas KBESS regulates intrastate school buses). Estimated revenue $1-2.5M, 10-19 employees per Manta. Kansas SOS web search portal blocked direct fetch (HTTP 403); recommend manual sos.ks.gov BESS search on 'School Services & Leasing Inc' for inc date/officers. Note: NOT a Lansing USD 469 in-house operation — district transportation runs separately under Director Jeff Bohnsack.

name: Davis Bus Svc LLC
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER searches on 'DAVIS BUS', 'DAVIS BUS SERVICE', 'DAVIS SCHOOL BUS', 'DAVIS BUS LINES' returned zero matching TN carriers. The 'DAVIS BUS LINES LLC' record (USDOT 3574220) is in Darlington WI — not a match. Source address 2840 S Church St #M1304, Murfreesboro TN 37127 is a UPS Store / mailbox-services address (suite #M1304 indicates a private mailbox), suggesting the LLC uses a mail drop rather than operational depot — consistent with a small intrastate pupil/childcare shuttle operator. Tennessee SOS business entity search (tncab.tnsos.gov) blocked direct fetch (HTTP 402); recommend manual sos.tn.gov search on 'Davis Bus Service LLC' in Rutherford County for control number, formation date, registered agent, and member/manager officers.
